mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Shikshanam was born from a deep reverence for India's ancient knowledge systems.
mission.paragraph2: Our mission is to make this profound knowledge accessible to everyone.
mission.visionText: To create a global community of learners who embrace ancient wisdom for modern living.

items.title: Comprehensive Courses
items.description: Structured learning paths in Sanskrit, Yoga, and ancient philosophy

items.title: Expert Guidance
items.description: Learn from experienced teachers and practitioners

items.title: Community Support
items.description: Connect with fellow learners on the journey of wisdom

items.title: Modern Technology
items.description: Ancient wisdom delivered through cutting-edge learning platforms

items.title: Authenticity
items.description: We preserve the original teachings without dilution or distortion

items.title: Accessibility
items.description: Making profound knowledge available to everyone, regardless of background

items.title: Community
items.description: Building connections between learners and teachers worldwide

cta.title: Join Our Journey
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a complete beginner or an advanced practitioner, Shikshanam offers a path for everyone to explore and embrace the wisdom of ancient India.
